isKeyDown.description: Returns true if the given key was pressed this frame.

isKeyHeld.descriptino: Returns true if the given key is being pressed currently.

isKeyUp.description: Returns true if the given key was released this frame.

isLMBDown.description: Returns true if the left mouse button is being held down.

isLMBClicked.description: Returns true if the left mouse button was pressed this frame.

isRMBDown.description: Returns true if the right mouse button is being held down.

isRMBClicked.description: Returns true if the right mouse button was pressed this frame.

getMouseMovement.description: Returns the amount the mouse has been moved by, if the mouse is not shown.

getMousePosition.description: Returns the current position of the mouse cursor on the screen in a scale from -1 to 1, if the mouse is visible.

setShowMouseCursor.description: Controls the visibility of the mouse cursor.

arguments.newValue: If the new value is true, the mouse cursor is shown. If it is false, the mouse cursor is invisible
